best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-recensione-001 title: create a new review module: recensione source pages: 1, 2 preconditions: user is logged in as a client. test data: - titolo: "great product" - descrizione: "i really liked the product." - voto: 5 - cliente: "john doe" - venditore: "vendor x" test steps: 1. log in as a client. 2. navigate to the review creation page. 3. enter the provided data into the respective fields. 4. click on the "submit review" button. expected result: a new review should be created with the provided details.
